text.title: Continuous Discovery Habits Core Rules
text.summary: 5 testable rules grounding Continuous Discovery Habits plus the universal skip/run routing pair (referenced by the decision tree).

rule.statement: Discovery touchpoints MUST be attended by the full trio (PM + Design Lead + Tech Lead); PM-only touchpoints MUST be reclassified as 'sales calls'.
rule.rationale: Single-discipline attendance produces single-discipline interpretation; the trio constraint is the structural gate against discovery silos.

rule.statement: The trio MUST hold ≥1 customer touchpoint per week; weeks without a touchpoint MUST be logged as discovery debt.
rule.rationale: Sub-weekly cadence loses signal freshness; the weekly rhythm is the minimum for compound learning.

rule.statement: Every spec MUST link to an opportunity node in the Opportunity Solution Tree (OST); orphan specs MUST be rejected at backlog grooming.
rule.rationale: Orphan specs drift from desired outcomes; the OST link is the only durable trace from outcome to feature.

rule.statement: Each candidate solution MUST identify its top-3 risky assumptions and run cheap tests on them before any production build.
rule.rationale: Building on untested assumptions is the dominant cause of low-impact features; assumption tests are the cheapest filter.

rule.statement: Features without a corresponding opportunity in the OST MUST be deferred; 'leadership wants this' is not an opportunity.
rule.rationale: Top-down feature insertion bypasses discovery and is the leading cause of shipped-but-unused features; the OST link is the structural gate.

rule.statement: If preconditions in `## Applies If` do not ALL hold OR any disqualifier in `## Skip If` fires, the agent MUST skip this methodology and document the skip reason in the cycle artefact.
rule.rationale: A minimum-form decision tree must route 'preconditions-not-satisfied' to skip; this rule is the canonical target.

rule.statement: If preconditions in `## Applies If` ALL hold AND no disqualifier fires, the agent MUST run the methodology end-to-end and produce the artefact specified in 02-output-contract.xml.
rule.rationale: Pair to skip-this-methodology; together they form the always-present minimal route.
